cycle: v6 deploy + fire -> caught 0-expert-QAT -> killed + guarded + filed
headline: v6 HELD (honest): deployed + verified + FIRED (owner GO), cleared the 2 prior footguns, BUT QAT covered 0 EXPERT modules (fused-3D OlmoeExperts + peft ParamWrapper unreached by per-nn.Linear STE) -> experts co-adapt to bf16 not NVFP4 -> doomed to v6~v5. KILLED at step 1/550 to save GPU. Added a runtime abort guard; deep fix filed.

v6_status.deployed: spark-bridge (byte-exact qat.py + train_lora.py from work branch; runner +4 --qat-* flags KEEPING --target-modules attn-mlp + --lora-dropout 0; poller allowlist). Verified: qat 15/15, dry-run B1 has BOTH crash-fixes AND 4 KD flags.
v6_status.fired_and_healthy: train cleared the 2 footguns (--target-modules attn-mlp + --lora-dropout 0), GPU 96%, epoch 1/5 step 1/550 loss 2.70. LoRA attn=64 expert=32.
v6_status.the_defect: QAT fake-quant on 64 module(s): attn=64 EXPERT=0. OlmoeExperts stores gate_up_proj/down_proj as 3-D Parameters wrapped by peft ParamWrapper -> unreached by attach_qat's per-nn.Linear STE + its lora_A/lora_B skip. Experts train against bf16 -> NOT co-adapted to NVFP4 -> v6 would ~= v5 (the co-adaptation doesn't happen where the ~10.8% uniform quant error lives). Offline qat 15/15 does NOT catch this (runtime wrapping gap).
v6_status.actions: Killed (GPU freed, JUDGE_HOLD cleared, partial adapter removed). Added a runtime ABORT guard in train_lora.py (SystemExit when experts exist + QAT expert-coverage==0; override QAT_ALLOW_UNCOVERED_EXPERTS=1) -> committed work branch 406090ee + re-deployed to spark-bridge 72aa65a5 so no future fire wastes hours.
v6_status.deep_fix_needed: STE-fake-quant the OlmoeExperts gate_up_proj/down_proj 3-D Parameters INSIDE the peft ParamWrapper forward (respecting _qat_bypass for the KD teacher). Needs verified on-Spark dev against the real ParamWrapper. VERIFY via the runtime coverage line showing expert>0 + a train step moving the expert params, NOT the offline invariants.
v6_status.held_until: expert-QAT coverage fixed + runtime-verified (expert>0). Do NOT re-fire v6 before that (the guard now aborts it anyway).

shippable_now_no_v6: v5 + --keep-top-experts 16 + conformal-abstention-serve -> ~94.5% answered @ ~0.975, no train (feat 7290f7a6, N-sweep 3c357ba3). v6's job (lift coverage) is already met no-train; v6 only adds value if the deep expert-QAT fix lets it lift RAW coverage at no memory cost.
guardrailsAck: canClaimAGI=false (v6 produced NO valid number -- killed pre-training; not claimed); lint_claims OK; --run-train was owner-approved live then aborted by me on the defect; JUDGE_HOLD set+cleared; code to work branch + sanctioned spark-bridge deploy.
open: World-model real-model ablation (cloud step 2) still pending.
